mapper.update: update STANDARDIZE_ORIGINAL_DICT set DICTIONARY_NAME = #{dictionaryName}, FACTURER_ID = #{facturerId}, FACTURER = #{facturer, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, STANDARD_DICTIONARY = #{standardDictionary}, STANDARD_DICTIONARY_ID = #{standardDictionaryId}, MEMO = #{memo, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = now() where id = #{id}
